description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant culture of Melbourne, where every corner reveals a new café, a stunning piece of street art, or a breathtaking view of nature. Over the course of seven days, you and your friends will explore the eclectic neighborhoods, indulge in the city's renowned coffee culture, and soak in the artistic atmosphere that makes Melbourne a top destination for travelers seeking both relaxation and inspiration. From the bustling laneways filled with murals to serene parks and gardens, this trip promises a perfect blend of urban exploration and natural beauty.

activities.description: Start your day at Hardware Société, a chic café known for its delicious French-inspired breakfast dishes. Try their famous baked eggs or the decadent French toast, paired with a perfectly brewed coffee.
Visit the iconic Flinders Street Station, a beautiful example of Victorian architecture. Take some photos and soak in the bustling atmosphere of this central hub.
Just a short walk from Flinders Street, Federation Square is a cultural precinct filled with galleries, restaurants, and public spaces. Enjoy the unique architecture and vibrant atmosphere.
Head to Degraves Street, famous for its laneway cafés and street art. Grab a light lunch at one of the many eateries, enjoying the lively vibe of this hidden gem.

activities.activity: Visit the National Gallery of Victoria
activities.description: Spend your afternoon at the National Gallery of Victoria, Australia's oldest and most visited art museum. Explore its impressive collection of international and Australian art.

activities.activity: Coffee Break at The Kettle Black
activities.description: Take a break at The Kettle Black, a stylish café known for its beautiful interior and exceptional coffee. Enjoy a refreshing drink or a sweet treat to recharge.

activities.activity: Evening Walk along the Yarra River
activities.description: End your day with a leisurely stroll along the Yarra River. Enjoy the scenic views of the city skyline as the sun sets, creating a perfect backdrop for your first day in Melbourne.
Savor a delicious dinner at Chin Chin, a popular restaurant offering modern Thai cuisine. Be sure to try their signature dishes and enjoy the vibrant atmosphere.

Start your day at Hardware Société, a charming café known for its delicious French-inspired breakfast dishes. Try their famous baked eggs or fluffy pancakes, paired with a rich coffee to kickstart your morning.

After breakfast, take a stroll to Hosier Lane, Melbourne's iconic street art hotspot. Marvel at the vibrant murals and graffiti that adorn the walls, capturing the city's creative spirit. Don't forget your camera!

Enjoy a lively lunch at Chin Chin, a popular restaurant serving modern Thai cuisine. The atmosphere is buzzing, and the dishes are bursting with flavor. Be sure to try their famous green curry or the crispy pork belly.

activities.activity: Visit the National Gallery of Victoria
activities.description: Spend your afternoon at the National Gallery of Victoria, Australia's oldest and most visited art museum. Explore its impressive collection of international and Australian art, including works by renowned artists.

activities.activity: Coffee Break at The Kettle Black
activities.description: Take a break at The Kettle Black, a stylish café known for its beautiful interior and exceptional coffee. Enjoy a refreshing iced latte or a slice of their decadent cake while soaking in the ambiance.

Wander through the eclectic streets of Fitzroy, known for its bohemian vibe and unique shops. Explore vintage stores, quirky boutiques, and local art galleries, making it a perfect spot for leisurely exploration.

End your day with dinner at Supernormal, a contemporary Asian eatery that offers a fusion of Japanese, Korean, and Chinese flavors. The atmosphere is vibrant, and the dishes are beautifully presented.

Start your day at Hardware Société, a trendy café known for its delicious French-inspired breakfast dishes. Don't miss their signature baked eggs and freshly brewed coffee, perfect for fueling your day of exploration.

activities.activity: Visit the National Gallery of Victoria
activities.description: Explore Australia's oldest and most visited art museum, the National Gallery of Victoria. With a diverse collection of international and Australian art, you can immerse yourself in culture and creativity. Admission is free, making it a perfect stop for art lovers.

Enjoy a leisurely lunch at The Kettle Black, a stylish café that offers a seasonal menu with a focus on fresh, local ingredients. Their unique dishes and beautiful presentation make it a must-visit for foodies.

activities.activity: Stroll through the Royal Botanic Gardens
activities.description: Take a relaxing walk through the stunning Royal Botanic Gardens, where you can enjoy the lush greenery and beautiful landscapes. It's a perfect spot to unwind and appreciate nature in the heart of the city.

Wander along the Southbank Promenade, where you can enjoy views of the Yarra River and the city skyline. This vibrant area is filled with street performers, shops, and cafés, making it a lively place to soak in the atmosphere.
End your day with a delightful dinner at Chin Chin, a popular restaurant known for its modern Thai cuisine. The lively atmosphere and innovative dishes will provide a memorable dining experience.

days.title: Day Trip to the Great Ocean Road

transit.memo: Start your day early to make the most of the Great Ocean Road.

activities.description: Famous for its surfing competitions, Bells Beach offers stunning coastal views and a chance to enjoy the ocean breeze. Take a leisurely walk along the beach and soak in the natural beauty.
Stop at a cozy café in Apollo Bay for a delicious lunch. Enjoy fresh seafood or a hearty burger while taking in the views of the bay.
Visit the iconic Twelve Apostles, towering limestone stacks rising from the Southern Ocean. Take a walk along the boardwalk for breathtaking views and photo opportunities.
Explore the stunning Loch Ard Gorge, known for its dramatic cliffs and rich history. A short walk will lead you to the beach where you can relax and enjoy the scenery.
Head back to Melbourne, reflecting on the day's adventures along the Great Ocean Road. Enjoy the scenic drive back to the city.
End your day with dinner at a trendy restaurant in Melbourne. Choose from a variety of cuisines, from Italian to Asian fusion, and enjoy the vibrant atmosphere of the city.
Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Hardware Société, known for its French-inspired dishes and cozy atmosphere. Don't miss their famous baked eggs and freshly brewed coffee!
Stroll through the stunning Royal Botanic Gardens, a lush oasis in the heart of Melbourne. Enjoy the diverse plant life and serene lakes, perfect for a leisurely walk or a peaceful moment on a bench.
Indulge in a delicious lunch at The Kettle Black, a stylish café known for its innovative brunch menu. Try their signature dishes like the 'Green Bowl' or the 'Ricotta Hotcakes'.
Take a scenic drive to the Dandenong Ranges, where you can enjoy breathtaking views and lush forests. Stop by the charming village of Olinda for a coffee break and some local art galleries.
Head to Lysterfield Park for a relaxing afternoon surrounded by nature. Enjoy walking or cycling around the lake, and keep an eye out for local wildlife such as kangaroos and various bird species.
End your day with dinner at The Glasshouse, a modern restaurant offering a seasonal menu with fresh, local ingredients. The ambiance is perfect for unwinding after a day of exploration.

activities.activity: Evening Walk along the Yarra River
activities.description: Take a leisurely evening walk along the Yarra River, enjoying the beautiful city skyline and the vibrant atmosphere. It's a perfect way to reflect on your day and soak in the Melbourne night.
Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Hardware Société, known for its French-inspired dishes and cozy atmosphere. Don't miss their famous baked eggs and freshly brewed coffee!

Explore the vibrant Queen Victoria Market, a bustling hub of fresh produce, gourmet foods, and unique souvenirs. Take your time to wander through the stalls and perhaps grab a snack from one of the food vendors.
Enjoy a leisurely lunch at The Coffee Emporium, where you can savor delicious sandwiches and salads paired with their specialty coffee. It's a perfect spot to recharge before more exploring.
Stroll along Brunswick Street, known for its eclectic mix of boutiques, street art, and cafes. Take in the vibrant atmosphere and perhaps stop for a coffee at one of the many trendy cafes.

activities.activity: Visit the National Gallery of Victoria
activities.description: Immerse yourself in art at the National Gallery of Victoria, Australia's oldest and most visited art museum. Explore its impressive collection of international and Australian art, and enjoy the beautiful gardens surrounding the gallery.
Indulge in a vibrant dinner at Chin Chin, a popular restaurant known for its modern Thai cuisine. The lively atmosphere and delicious dishes make it a must-visit for food lovers.

activities.activity: Evening Walk along the Yarra River
activities.description: End your day with a relaxing walk along the Yarra River. Enjoy the stunning views of the city skyline as the lights begin to twinkle, creating a magical atmosphere.

transit.memo: A short drive to enjoy the beach before departure.

activities.description: Start your day at the beautiful St Kilda Beach, where you can take a leisurely stroll along the shore and enjoy the fresh ocean breeze. Don't forget to snap some photos of the iconic pier!

Visit the historic Luna Park, an amusement park with a charming vintage vibe. Take a ride on the scenic roller coaster or simply enjoy the lively atmosphere. It's a great spot for some fun and nostalgia!
Enjoy a delicious brunch at The Kettle Black, known for its stylish decor and innovative dishes. Try their famous avocado toast or a refreshing smoothie bowl for a perfect meal before heading out.

Take a relaxing walk around Albert Park, a beautiful green space with a picturesque lake. It's a perfect spot to unwind and enjoy nature before your departure. You might even spot some local wildlife!
Stop by St Ali, one of Melbourne's iconic cafes, for a final coffee fix. Known for its exceptional brews and vibrant atmosphere, it's the perfect place to reflect on your trip with friends.
Head back to your hotel to collect your belongings and prepare for your departure. Take a moment to reminisce about the wonderful memories made during your stay in Melbourne!
